signals.headline: IMF Raises South Korea 2026 Inflation Forecast to 2
signals.raw:
IMF Raises South Korea 2026 Inflation Forecast to 2.5% Amid Middle East Oil Risks | YES | HIGH confidence** [3][5]

South Korea's IMF-updated World Economic Outlook, released April 14, 2026, lifted the 2026 inflation projection to 2.5%—up 0.7 points from October 2025's 1.8%—due to Middle East tensions driving global oil prices higher, while holding GDP growth at 1.9% offset by a supplementary budg
